The Optimizely Web Experimentation REST API provides programmatic access to Optimizely's A/B testing and web experimentation platform. Developers can manage experiments, projects, audiences, pages, events, campaigns, and other resources through RESTful endpoints. The API uses OAuth2 Bearer token authentication and provides access to data and services like Stats Engine and customer profiles, enabling integration of experimentation workflows into custom applications.

Contact Support:
 Name: Optimizely Support
